query:
SELECT m.id, m.role, SUBSTRING(m.content, 1, 120) as content, m.createdAt
FROM messages m 
WHERE m.id >= 510045 AND m.id <= 510060
ORDER BY m.id ASC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2DPRZMbFg2pLCxP.d66dc093df58 --database hEsNGYEonud5ngJEe9CdHq --execute SELECT m.id, m.role, SUBSTRING(m.content, 1, 120) as content, m.createdAt

ORDER BY m.id ASC
